titleStmt.title: SII 9.122: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 122. (A.R. No. 468 of 1923.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN FRONT OF THE SIVA TEMPLE AT PULAKURTI, RAYADRUG TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 980, Viḷambi, Āshāḍha, śu. 2, Bṛihaspativāra, Dakshiṇāyanasaṁkrānti, Vyatīpāta corresponding to A.D. 1058, June 25, Thursday; Dakshiṇāyana saṅkrānti occurred on June 26 Friday. It refers itself to the reign of the Chālukya king Traiḷōkyamalladēva ruling from Kōḷūru and mentions his feudatories the Mahāsāmanta Bachcharasa, of the Karikāla family Gōnarasa and Bhīmarasa as ruling over Ayyaṇavāḍi three-hundred and Kaṇiyakallu three-hundred from the nelevīḍu of Digghige. It records that at the request of the Daṇḍanāyaka Gōpaṇṇa, the Mahāsāmanta Bachcharasa and others made a gift of lands to the Mahājanas of Vēmulavāḍa-Pūlukuṟuke.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti [.] samastabhuvanāśraya śrīpri
thvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja pa
ramēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśraya
kuḷatilakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattrailō
kyamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarā
bhivṛddhipravarddhamānamācandrārkka tāraṁbaraṁ salu
ttaṁ kōḷūra bīḍinalu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁ
geyuttire tatpādapadmōpajīvigaḷa ppasamadhi
gatapañcamahāśabda mahāsāma
nta vijayalakṣmīkānta haridurddharavarabhu
jāsibhāsura pracaṇḍapradyōditadinaka
rakulanandanaṁ kāsyapagōtraṁ karikālānva
yaṁ sikhisikhadhvajaṁ siṁhalāṁchanaṁ kāvērīnā
thaṁ kaṁbaḻapaṟeghōṣaṇanoṟeyūrppura
varēśvaraṁ vīramahēśvaraṁ kollimalayuktā
ntakaṁ maṇḍalaṁgāva nāmādisamasta pra
sastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāsāmaṁta ba
ccarasanuṁ gōnarasanuṁ bhīmarasanua
yyaṇavāḍi mūnūṟumaṁ kaṇiyaka
lmūnūṟumaṁ sarbbābhyantarasiddhiyiṁdāḷutta
digghigeya nelevīḍinalsukhade rājyaṁ
geyyuttire sakavarṣa 980 neya viḷaṁ
bisaṁvatsarada Āṣāḍha suddha bidige bṛ
haspativāraṁ dakṣiṇāyanasaṁkrānti
vyatīpātadaṁdu daṁḍanāyaka kētammanā
malaḍidōrayyana gōpaṇnanabinnapadiṁdaka
ṇiyakalla mūnūṟaṟoḷage Agrahāra vēmu
lavāḍa pūlukuṟukeyūroḍeya sōmanā
thaseṭṭipramukhamahājanamaṟuvadiṁbarggedhā
rāpūrbakaṁ māḍi biṭṭukoṭṭa gōpāṁbudi
jitabhaṭṭarge ca
dharmma [.]
Digital edition of SII 9.122 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
